response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience with strong alignment on the core stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes are all present across multiple roles. His current position at re:cinq directly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) tooling, which is a rare and highly relevant differentiator for a role that lists AI agent development as a requirement. The primary gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js experience, no mention of Kotlin or Python, and no Vitest or Playwright listed — though his demonstrated adaptability across a wide range of languages and his deep testing culture suggest these are learnable ramps rather than hard blockers.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack production experience with hands-on TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple companies
Direct AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) in current role — uncommon and directly matches the JD requirement
Deep, demonstrated testing culture: TDD practitioner, author of testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and community workshop facilitator on the subject
concerns: Nest.js is entirely absent from the resume despite being a named primary stack requirement
No explicit mention of Kotlin, Python, Vitest, or Playwright — leaves gaps across multiple required languages and testing tools
Current role at re:cinq is only ~1 month old, providing minimal verifiable track record in the most recent position

key_factors.factor: 15+ years full-stack breadth across diverse stacks
